feed.title: Exyde - Sly
feed.subtitle: Hello there. Welcome to my online notebook-portfolio thing. Enjoy your stay here. :purple_heart:

entry.title: Hello Burning World
entry.content:
Hello There.

An old time project

I finally decided to put some time on creating my own custom website. While the world is burning & the french politics are going mad, I decided to deploy this kind of personnal online notebook. I plain to share a lot of things here, such as :

  • Programming related topics
  • Experimentation about art, audio, generative stuffs
  • Personnal toughs on life, society, spiritually
  • Technical Art
  • In fact, everything I want, since it’s my blog :]

Why for ?

There are at least two purposes in this blog.

  1. I’ve a bad memory, and it’s a good way to keep track off some topics, knowledge, experimentations, toughs.
  2. Sharing this knowledge with other people, who might be interested !

Lately, who am I ?

So… I’m Sly, or Exyde. I’m a french Game Maker, Designer, Artist, Programmer… and I don’t like boxes. I’m pretty the non-exhaustive list above tell a lot more about who I am than any predefined job name to be honnest :] But I’m pretty sure you’ll learn more about me following the posts in the blog section (or looking at the upcoming gallery ._.)

Aniway… cheers !

Sly.

This page is in progress and will evolve with time, probably.
